title: Ohann
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Tatoo_system.png]] |name=Ohann
Occupying the second orbit in a diagram of the Tatoo system |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] |sector=[[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] |system=[[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]] |coordinates=R-16 |xyz= |distance= |suns=2: *[[Tatoo I/Legends|Tatoo I]] *[[Tatoo II/Legends|Tatoo II]] |orbited= |position=2''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |moons=3 |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=[[Gas giant/Legends|Gas giant]] |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Ohann's ice rings]] {{C|in orbit}}{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Garouf Lafoe}} |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} '''Ohann''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|stars]] [[Tatoo I/Legends|Tatoo I]] and [[Tatoo II/Legends|Tatoo II]] in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatoo system]]. Located in the [[Arkanis sector/Legends|Arkanis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]. It was the largest out of the three planets in the Tatoo system. [[Drone barge/Legends|Drone barges]] were used to ferry [[Water/Legends|ice]] blocks''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' from [[Ohann's ice rings]]. The [[free-trader]] [[Garouf Lafoe/Legends|Garouf Lafoe]] imported ice from Adriana's rings to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010510a|text=The Storm's Edge|int=The Storm's Edge}} {{Mo}} *''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Planet Tatooine]]'' *{{CCG|set=A New Hope Limited|cardname=Garouf Lafoe}} *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Episode I]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]'' *{{FactFile|16|HUN 5-8|The Hunt for the Droids}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{HolonetOld|planets|tatooine|Tatooine}} {{1stp}} {{Po}} *{{FactFile2013|2|HUN 5-8|The Hunt for the Droids}} *{{FactFile2014|2|0 ABY 11-14|The Hunt for the Droids}} ===Non-canon sources=== *{{InQuestCite|23|The InQuest World Guide to Tatooine}} {{Un}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ohann |es=Ohann |nl=Ohann |pl=Ohann }} [[Category:Gas giants]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Tatoo system locations]]
